The Urfa pilgrimage was [[Kamidere|Kamidere's]] pilgrimage to Urfa

{{Alpha Pilgrimage}}

[[Category:Alpha Pilgrimage]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
